pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.2 to align with Java 17 support.
Configure the project to compile and run with Java 17.
Remove unused Spring Boot starter dependencies to clean up the build.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed spring-boot-starter-data-cassandra, elasticsearch, mongodb, redis, rest, jdbc, jooq, mustache, thymeleaf, hateoas.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics export.
Enable Spring Security by adding the starter dependency.
Add Bean Validation support via the starter.
Add configuration processor for IDE hints on custom properties.
Update Guava library to a newer version compatible with Java 17.
Remove H2 in-memory database dependency as it is no longer used.
Remove MySQL connector dependency as it is no longer used.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver for database connectivity.
Update Database Rider to a newer version for better test support.
Add Database Rider Spring integration module.
Add AssertJ library for fluent assertions in tests.
Add TestContainers PostgreSQL module for integration testing.
Enable Spring Boot layers for optimized Docker image builds.
Configure the target Docker image name for Spring Boot build.
Disable test forking in Surefire to improve debugging or compatibility.
Add Git Commit ID plugin to generate build metadata.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Updated fully qualified class names in spring.factories to reflect the package rename from com.xpinjection.springboot to com.xpinjection.library.
src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.human_impl: Changed 'com.xpinjection.springboot.init' to 'com.xpinjection.library.config.init' for all registered Spring factories.

src/main/resources/db/migration/V1.00__b.general_idea: Replaced H2-specific identity column syntax with PostgreSQL-compatible BIGSERIAL to support the database migration.
src/main/resources/db/migration/V1.00__b.human_impl: Changed 'id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY' to 'id BIGSERIAL primary key'

src/main/resources/static/error/404.html.general_idea: Added lang attribute to html tag for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Added a descriptive title to the error page for better UX and browser tab labeling.

src/main/resources/static/index.html.general_idea: Added lang attribute to html tag for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Added a title element to the head section to define the page title.

src/main/resources/templates/error/5xx.f.general_idea: Added the lang attribute to the html tag for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Added a descriptive title to the internal server error page.

src/main/resources/templates/library.ftl.general_idea: Added the lang attribute to the html tag for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Added a head section with a title tag to properly structure the HTML document.

src/test/resources/books-for-the-same-au.general_idea: Added a TRUNCATE statement to clear the book table before inserting test data to ensure test isolation.

src/test/resources/datasets/default-book.general_idea: Added a DOCTYPE declaration to link the XML dataset to a DTD schema for validation.
Renamed the XML element from uppercase BOOK to lowercase book to align with naming conventions or schema requirements.

src/test/resources/datasets/empty.xml.general_idea: Added a DOCTYPE declaration to reference the database DTD for XML validation.
Renamed the BOOK element to lowercase book to match Java entity naming conventions.
Added an empty expert element to the dataset to ensure schema completeness.
Added an empty recommendations element to the dataset to ensure schema completeness.

src/test/resources/datasets/expected-boo.general_idea: Added a DOCTYPE declaration referencing a DTD file to enable schema validation for the test dataset XML.
Changed the XML element name from uppercase 'BOOK' to lowercase 'book' to align with standard naming conventions or schema requirements.
Added an 'id' attribute with a regex pattern to handle dynamic or generated IDs during test assertions.

src/test/resources/datasets/stored-books.general_idea: Added a DOCTYPE declaration to link the XML dataset to a DTD schema for validation.
Added an empty recommendations element to the dataset to ensure the table is present or cleared during test setup.
Renamed the book element from uppercase BOOK to lowercase book to align with database table naming conventions or schema changes.
